# Northstar Admissions Update

Priority: latest_update.md > platform_specs.txt > visual_rules.json > asset_manifest.json > deprecated_assets.json > brand_brief.md.

Active platform: Instagram Story. Ignore the old campus-web banner and square feed notes.

Final copy must combine these parts:

- Event title: Open Studio Day
- School name: Northstar Design School
- Date: July 12
- Time: 10 AM - 2 PM
- Location: 88 Beacon Ave, Studio Hall
- CTA: RSVP for portfolio tours

Replace the previous date `June 8`, old campus name `Northstar Arts Annex`, and CTA `Apply now`. Do not use scholarship or tuition discount claims.
